# ClientCapabilities.SupportsSamplingTools property

`true` if the client declared the deprecated `sampling.tools` sub-flag (§6.2, R-6.2-p). This gates supplying `tools`/`toolChoice` during sampling (see `CapabilityNegotiation.MayUseSamplingTools`).

```csharp
public bool SupportsSamplingTools { get; }
```
